__init__.docstring:
Initialize the spaCy processor.
        
        Args:
            model_name: Name of the spaCy model to use
            **options: Additional options for the processor

nlp.docstring: Thread-safe lazy load of the spaCy model.

process_text.docstring: Process text with the spaCy pipeline and return the Doc object.

extract_linguistic_units.docstring:
Extract linguistic units using spaCy.
        
        Args:
            text: Input text to process
            unit_types: Types of units to extract ('sentences', 'noun_phrases', 'entities', etc.)
                       If None, extracts all supported types
        
        Returns:
            List of LinguisticUnit objects

supported_unit_types.docstring: Get the list of unit types supported by this processor.

SpacyBoundaryProvider.docstring: Boundary provider using spaCy for linguistic boundary detection.

capabilities.docstring: Get capabilities of this boundary provider.

get_boundaries.docstring:
Get text boundaries using spaCy.
        
        Args:
            text: Text to analyze
            boundary_types: Types of boundaries to detect
            **options: Additional options for boundary detection
            
        Returns:
            List of boundary dictionaries
